{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Horizon's eyes
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] has a cloud of unique eyes that hover behind her which are trophies from enemies.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
